name: Kindergarten Homestead Lab — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

units.title: Wonder and notice: self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

activities.title: A close look at self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in self-care, routines, sorting, and helping safely at home.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
